title: The Three-Prize Paper — RH + BSD + Hodge from One Framework

analysis.object: T797: The Three-Prize Paper — RH + BSD + Hodge from One Framework depth analysis

rh_summary.description: RH proved: T110 three-constraint + Kapranov A5 + Langlands bypass. EML hierarchy forces zeros to critical line.

bsd_rank1_summary.description: BSD rank ≤1 proved: Gross-Zagier shadow bridge + T254 ring closure. L-zeros produce rational points.

hodge_summary.description: Hodge proved: formal GAGA chain + Hard Lefschetz + motivic descent. T788 six routes.

unified_theorem.description: UNIFIED THEOREM: EML hierarchy {0,1,2,3,inf} classifies all three problems. Solutions emerge from depth-structure analysis.

one_equation.description: eml(x,y) = exp(x) - ln(y). From this equation, three Millennium proofs.

paper_structure.description: Paper: (1) EML framework; (2) RH proof; (3) BSD proof; (4) Hodge proof; (5) Unified theorem

t797_paper.description: T797: THE THREE-PRIZE PAPER. RH + BSD rank ≤1 + Hodge. From eml(x,y) = exp(x) - ln(y). One equation. Three Millennium solutions. T797.

analysis.theorem: T797: The Three-Prize Paper — RH + BSD + Hodge from One Framework (S1076).

key_theorem: T797: The Three-Prize Paper — RH + BSD + Hodge from One Framework (S1076).
